blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,122 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
